data.name: Hachishaku
data.detailed_description:
繁體中文翻譯即將推出！敘事

  • 在最近被遺棄的「啥啥村」，純淨僧侶血脈的最後一人——茶道先生，尋找他為何在童年被送往東京、為何村民全部逃離，以及他深情懷念的美麗青梅竹馬發生了什麼的答案。然而，一個傳說中的幽靈潛伏在村中，獵捕你的純淨能量！保護茶道先生的純淨，找到擺脫八尺大人掌控的方法！

遊戲玩法

  • 《八尺大人》是一款潛行恐怖風格遊戲，你將調查村莊，尋找答案，找到5個神聖地藏並歸還至神社，同時收集金錢，為你的8英尺高潛行者購買各種服裝、飾品和髮型。閱讀村民留下的日記和筆記，揭開村莊過去的真相。找到被時間遺忘的八尺大人的照片證據！

首發內容與更新計劃！

  • 遊戲首發包含10套服裝、6種髮型，以及大量飾品和帽子供你用金幣購買，未來還將考慮添加更多內容！首發後不久，更新還將加入「偶像模式」，讓你在八尺大人的秘密藏身處享受平靜的生活。

逃離村莊，被靈界帶走，還是直面你的使命！

data.short_description: 探索啥啥村，尋找你過去的答案，躲避 hauntingly美麗的8英尺高八尺大人！繁體中文翻譯即將推出！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: intel I7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: RTX 2070 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Please make sure to force DX 11 through the steam launch settings to prevent crashing

data.legal_notice: This game is copyright 2025 Trash Panda Games

data.name: Hachishaku
data.detailed_description:
• Narrative

    In the recently abandoned village of NaniNani Mura, the last in a lineage of pure monks named Chado-san searches for answers about why he was sent away to Tokyo as a child, why the residents have all fled, and what happened to the beautiful child hood friend he remembers fondly. However a legendary Spirit haunts the village and is hunting your pure energy! Protect Chado-san's purity and find a way to escape Hachishaku's grasp!

  • Gameplay

    Hachishaku is a stalker horror style game where you investigate the village, find answers, search for the 5 sacred jizo to return them to their shrines, and collect money to buy various costumes, accessories and hair styles for your 8 foot tall stalker. Read the journals and notes left by the villagers to discover the truth about the village's past. Find photographic evidence of Hachishaku forgotten by time!

  • Launch Content and Update Plans! 

    The game includes 10 costumes, 6 hair styles, and plenty of accessories and hats to save your coins for at launch, but more will be considered and added in the future! Soon after launch an update will also let you enjoy the Gravure Mode - a peaceful life with Hachishaku in her secret hideout. 

Escape the village, Get spirited away, or confront your duty!

data.short_description: Search the village of Naninani Mura to find answers about your past and evade the hauntingly beautiful 8 foot tall HachiShaku-sama!
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: intel I7
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: RTX 2070 or better
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Please make sure to force DX 11 through the steam launch settings to prevent crashing
